description: Arrow/Parquet physical schema for implemented completed Quantik head-to-head games.
notes: game-result.v1 is for completed games, not root search observations.
Current Quantik contracts encode no draw outcome.
Parquet key/value metadata should include physical_schema, logical_schema, logical_contract, contracts_release, and contract_version.
physical_schema, logical_schema, and logical_contract must all be game-result.v1.
contracts_release and contract_version should match contracts.json.release_version for release artifacts.
The implemented v1 surface intentionally stores started_at and position keys as utf8 for Python/Rust parity.
Use this data for H2H stats and Elo proxy estimation.
